# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

formation.5 = {
	type = country_event
	placement = ROOT

	title = formation.5.t
	desc = formation.5.d
	flavor = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				desc = formation.5.f
				trigger = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				}
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				desc = formation.5.f2
				trigger = {
					always = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	event_image = {
		video = "unspecific_signed_contract"
	}

	on_created_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/UI/Alerts/event_appear"

	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/event_icons/waving_flag.dds"

	duration = 3

	trigger = {
		c:IBE ?= THIS
		NOT = { has_global_variable = has_formed_ibe }
	}

	immediate = {
		set_global_variable = has_formed_ibe
		save_scope_as = formation_country
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_diplomatic_relevance = ROOT
			}
			post_notification = unification_notification_ibe
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = formation.5.a
		default_option = yes
		add_modifier = {
			name = unification_prestige
			days = very_long_modifier_time
		}
		unification_claims_effect = yes
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 1
		}
	}
}

formation.14 = {
	type = country_event
	placement = ROOT

	title = formation.14.t
	desc = formation.14.d
	flavor = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				desc = formation.14.f
				trigger = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				}
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				desc = formation.14.f2
				trigger = {
					OR = {
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_census_voting
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_wealth_voting
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
					}
				}
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				desc = formation.14.f3
				trigger = {
					always = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}

	event_image = {
		video = "unspecific_signed_contract"
	}

	on_created_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/UI/Alerts/event_appear"

	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/event_icons/waving_flag.dds"

	duration = 3

	trigger = {
		c:BHT ?= THIS
		NOT = { has_global_variable = has_formed_india }
	}

	immediate = {
		set_global_variable = has_formed_india
		save_scope_as = formation_country
		ruler = { save_scope_as = ruler_scope }
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_diplomatic_relevance = ROOT
			}
			post_notification = unification_notification_ind
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = formation.5.a
		default_option = yes
		add_modifier = {
			name = unification_prestige
			days = very_long_modifier_time
		}
		unification_claims_effect = yes
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 1
		}
	}
}

formation.18 = {
	type = country_event
	placement = ROOT

	title = formation.18.t
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				}
				desc = formation.18.d_1
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					coa_fascist_trigger = yes
					NOT = {
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
					}
				}
				desc = formation.18.d_2
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
				}
				desc = formation.18.d_3
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					OR = {
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_corporate_state
					}
				}
				desc = formation.18.d_4
			}
		}
	}
	flavor = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				}
				desc = formation.18.f_1
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					coa_fascist_trigger = yes
					NOT = {
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
					}
				}
				desc = formation.18.f_2
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
				}
				desc = formation.18.f_3
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					OR = {
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_corporate_state
					}
				}
				desc = formation.18.f_4
			}
		}
	}
	event_image = {
		video = "unspecific_signed_contract"
	}

	on_created_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/UI/Alerts/event_appear"

	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/event_icons/waving_flag.dds"

	duration = 3

	trigger = {
		c:HRE ?= THIS
		NOT = { has_global_variable = has_formed_hre }
	}

	immediate = {
		set_global_variable = has_formed_hre
		save_scope_as = formation_country
		ruler = { save_scope_as = ruler_scope }
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_diplomatic_relevance = ROOT
			}
			post_notification = unification_notification_hre_culture
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = formation.18.a
		default_option = yes
		add_modifier = {
			name = unification_prestige
			days = very_long_modifier_time
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 1
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = formation.18.b
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
			NOT = {
				c:FRA ?= {
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 1
		}
		ROOT = {
			create_incident = {
				country = c:FRA
				value = 15
			}
		}
		add_modifier = {
			name = unification_prestige
			days = very_long_modifier_time
		}
		add_primary_culture = cu:french
		add_radicals = {
			value = medium_radicals
			culture = cu:north_german
		}
		add_radicals = {
			value = medium_radicals
			culture = cu:south_german
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = formation.18.c
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
			}
			NOT = {
				coa_fascist_trigger = yes
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			factor = 1
		}
		add_modifier = {
			name = unification_prestige
			days = very_long_modifier_time
		}
		add_primary_culture = cu:french
		add_radicals = {
			value = large_radicals
			culture = cu:north_german
		}
		add_radicals = {
			value = large_radicals
			culture = cu:south_german
		}
	}
}
